name: Outreach: Handle Reply

description.en: Record that a contact replied to an outreach message. Tags the contact as 'outreach-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled manually or by the agent.
description.de: Erfassen, dass ein Kontakt auf eine Outreach-Nachricht geantwortet hat. Markiert den Kontakt als 'outreach-replied', damit die Sequenz gestoppt und die Antwort manuell oder durch den Agenten behandelt werden kann.
description.es: Record that a contact replied to an outreach message. Tags the contact as 'outreach-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled manually or by the agent.
description.fr: Record that a contact replied to an outreach message. Tags the contact as 'outreach-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled manually or by the agent.
description.ro: Record that a contact replied to an outreach message. Tags the contact as 'outreach-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled manually or by the agent.
description.it: Record that a contact replied to an outreach message. Tags the contact as 'outreach-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled manually or by the agent.

bot: Use this when a contact replies to an outreach message. Tags them as replied and logs the interaction.

inputs.name: Contact
inputs.bot: The hashid of the CRM contact who replied.

inputs.name: Description
inputs.bot: Brief summary of what the contact said in their reply.

success.en: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.de: Antwort erfasst. Kontakt als geantwortet markiert.
success.es: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.fr: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.ro: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
success.it: Reply recorded. Contact tagged as replied.
